title: Doff Container & Basket Feed Concentrate – 1L Fast-Acting Liquid Seaweed Fertiliser for Healthy Growth & Blooms – Balanced Plant Food for Indoor & Outdoor Flowers & Hanging Baskets – Makes 300L Feed
features: VERSATILE PLANT NUTRITION – Boost the health of flowers and fruit plants with Doff Container & Basket Plant Feed Concentrate. Enriched with NPK 4-4-4, micro-nutrients and seaweed, this fast-acting plant fertiliser promotes healthier, stronger plants in containers, tubs and hanging baskets

BOOST GROWTH & RESILIENCE – Rich in nitrogen, phosphorus, and potassium, this plant food strengthens roots, stimulates flowering, and improves overall plant health from root to tip. Dilute 1 capful into 4.5L of water and apply the liquid fertiliser to the base of the plant, feeding every 7-14 days

EASY-TO-USE FORMULA – This plant feed is conveniently supplied with an integral measure for precise dilution every time. Whether nurturing hanging baskets or expansive gardens, Doff’s garden fertiliser saves time and effort, offering professional results with minimal fuss

RELIABLE & EFFECTIVE RESULTS – This high-quality liquid fertiliser for plants provides consistent nutrition for thriving plants year-round. Ideal for indoor and outdoor plants, a 1-litre bottle dilutes into 300 litres of nutrient-rich feed to support healthy growth in plants large and small

NOURISHING PLANT FEED – With decades of expert experience, Doff products are your go-to for vibrant, healthy plants. Our quality-crafted feeds and straight solutions are proudly made in the UK, offering effective and complete nutritional plant food to help your garden grow
